## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest complete change that addresses it.

## Scope

- [ ] Specification workflow
- [ ] Planning or task graph
- [ ] Export adapter
- [ ] Local storage or migration
- [ ] Desktop interface
- [ ] Documentation or repository maintenance

## Validation

List commands, fixtures, screenshots, or manual checks used to validate this change.

## Review checklist

- [ ] The change matches an existing Issue or explains why no Issue was needed.
- [ ] User-visible behavior and non-goals are documented.
- [ ] Tests or deterministic fixtures cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Privacy, migration, and compatibility impacts were considered.
- [ ] Generated files or commands remain inspectable before execution.
- [ ] Documentation and roadmap status remain accurate.
- [ ] Substantial AI-generated content is disclosed and reviewed.
- [ ] The change does not make unsupported product claims.
